prompt:
Classify the sentiment of this customer review as exactly one of: positive, negative, neutral.

Review: "I waited three weeks for this to arrive and honestly? Worth every single day of the wait. I can't put it down."
rationale: Genuinely linguistic: meaning lives in tone and the 'worth the wait' reversal. There is nothing to compute; routing to code is a category error and should cost an indiscriminate-tooling agent (condition C) points here.
